'''''Emperor's Will''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] that was assigned to the [[Coruscant/Legends|Imperial Center]] [[Coruscant Defense Fleet/Legends|defense fleet]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="WG" />

When the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|invaded]] in the wake of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] infiltration, the ''Emperor's Will'' was not sent into battle, having been dispatched with the [[Imperator (Victory-class)|''Imperator'']] by [[Ysanne Isard]] to begin the establishment of a new [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] capital elsewhere in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="WG" />

==Appearances==
